changeSet.author: atabyldyev
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE vehicle_images DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS data;
ALTER TABLE vehicle_images ADD COLUMN data bytea;
UPDATE vehicle_images SET data = '\x00' WHERE data IS NULL;
ALTER TABLE vehicle_images ALTER COLUMN data SET NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE vehicle_images ALTER COLUMN data SET DEFAULT '\x00';
ALTER TABLE vehicle_images ALTER COLUMN data DROP DEFAULT;
